sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_data (index1 UInt64, index2 UInt64);
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM h3_data WHERE h3IndexesAreNeighbors(index1, index2) = 1) AS neighbors_exist;
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT number FROM numbers(20) WHERE number < 5) AS less_than_five, EXISTS(SELECT number FROM numbers(20) WHERE number > 15) AS greater_than_fifteen;
SELECT count() FROM h3_data WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM h3_data AS sub WHERE h3IndexesAreNeighbors(sub.index1, sub.index2) = 1) GROUP BY index1 HAVING count() > 0;
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT min(number) FROM numbers(10) WHERE number > toUInt64(5)) AS min_exists, h3IndexesAreNeighbors(617420388351344639, 617420388351999999) AS neighbors_check;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_data AS SELECT number, h3IndexesAreNeighbors(617420388351344639, number) AS is_neighbor FROM numbers(20);
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM temp_data WHERE is_neighbor = 1) AS temp_neighbors_exist, COUNT() FROM temp_data WHERE is_neighbor = 1;
SELECT index1, index2 FROM h3_data WHERE EXISTS(SELECT * FROM numbers(10) WHERE number = index1 % 10) AND h3IndexesAreNeighbors(index1, index2) = 0;
